proof:
have h1 := p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero u0 u1
have h : constApproxError2 u0 u1 c = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by
  calc
    constApproxError2 u0 u1 c = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) * ((u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1)) := by
      unfold constApproxError2 p0ProjectionResidualSq2
      ring
    _ = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) * 0 := by rw [h1]
    _ = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by ring
have h2 : 0 <= 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by positivity
linarith

unfold weightedP0Average
have h : (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) * c := by
  rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i hi
  ring
rw [h]
ring

unfold weightedP0Residual weightedP0Average
simp_rw [mul_sub, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass]
ring

unfold laxFriedrichsStep
have ⟨hL, hR⟩ := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg hL, abs_of_nonneg hR]
have h1 := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hL
have h2 := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hR
apply le_trans (add_le_add h1 h2)
apply le_of_eq
rw [← add_mul, laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl, one_mul]

simp only [weightedP0Average]
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass]
ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
· constructor <;> linarith

have h : kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c) = fun _ => 3 * c ^ 2 := by
  ext j
  exact kdvCanonicalFlux_const c j
rw [h]
exact fluxDifference_const_zero (3 * c ^ 2) i

unfold diag2First diag2Second vec2InfNorm
apply max_le
· rw [abs_mul]
have hx : |x| <= max |x| |y| := abs_left_le_vec2InfNorm x y
exact mul_le_mul ha hx (abs_nonneg x) hrho
· rw [abs_mul]
have hy : |y| <= max |x| |y| := abs_right_le_vec2InfNorm x y
exact mul_le_mul hb hy (abs_nonneg y) hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
rw [hsum]
ring

unfold centeredSignal finiteMean finiteDC
simp only [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard]
ring
